allow: PowerShell(git ls-files | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "static/\(js|css\)" }; "---gitignore---"; Test-Path .gitignore; "---venv---"; Test-Path venv; "---railway/procfile---"; Test-Path Procfile; Test-Path railway.json; Test-Path nixpacks.toml)
PowerShell(& ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet; if \($?\) { "=== OK install ===" } else { "=== FALLO install ===" })

PowerShell($env:FLASK_SKIP_DOTENV='1'; python -c "from backend.app import create_app; from backend.app.services import cloudinary_service; app=create_app\(\); ctx=app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); print\('configurado:', cloudinary_service.esta_configurado\(\)\); print\('cloud_name:', app.config['CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME']\)")
